core_modules.description: Core sequence object model and sequence transformation utilities central to Biopython usage.
Primary sequence file I/O facade supporting many biological file formats.
Modern alignment API for pairwise and multiple alignments, parsing/writing alignments and alignment operations.
Legacy and broadly used alignment I/O layer with format conversion support.
Search result parsing and writing framework (BLAST, HMMER, Infernal, etc.).
Protein structure parsing, manipulation, and export toolkit.
Phylogenetic tree parsing, format conversion, and visualization helpers.
NCBI Entrez HTTP client utilities for programmatic bioinformatics data retrieval.
BLAST result parsing/writing interfaces and model objects.

cli_commands.name: query_pubmed.py
cli_commands.description: Example utility script for querying PubMed via Entrez APIs.

cli_commands.description: Script utility related to SCOP/PDB processing.
